case_title: CHRISTOPHER ALEXANDER VS. SECTOR LABS LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER, CHRISTOPHER AS TO DEFENDANT SECTOR LABS LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER, CHRISTOPHER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SECTOR LABS LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $16,920.30 PRINCIPAL, $159.50 INTEREST, $303.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,383.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
